reply.text: You look like the reason sunscreen sales went up this summer

messages.text: Relax sunscreen salesman im not sponsoring you
im just saying stock probably jumped after that story
You sound very invested in those imaginary sunscreen profits
Someone has to track the economy and your beach pics
That is a very weird combo of hobbies honestly 😳
It is called balance and also survival for my eyes
Your eyes will live stop being dramatic over one story
World leaders probably paused meetings to zoom into that towel
If they zoomed like you they need new jobs immediately
im just gathering evidence that youre dangerous in daylight
ill risk total collapse for front row field research
when are we doing drinks? text me 555 839 5016
